payload.label: cabinet
payload.long_description: Vertical, dark-stained wooden cabinet door with a recessed central panel and narrow side trim; surface shows subtle wood grain and a matte-to-semi-gloss finish, small scuff near the bottom edge, and the image is edge-cropped at the left and right — estimated ~0.8 m from camera.
